title: draba glacialis
intro: Draba glacialis, also known as Arctic Whitlowgrass or Draba, is a small, perennial plant that belongs to the family Brassicaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Draba glacialis include its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing, as well as its potential to help with respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant is typically prepared as a herbal infusion or tincture, and can be used to make salves or ointments for topical application.
